title: winmake: fix typos in comments and warning messages
body:
Fix three spelling mistakes in `winmake.ps1`:

- `retriving` → `retrieving` in architecture detection warning message
- `usefult` → `useful` in `DocumentationUsingPodman` comment
- `specfic` → `specific` in help text output

comments.body:
LGTM
once the DCO is cleaned up.

`git commit --amend -s` fetch, rebase, push.
